question_text: A kettle is rated at 2 kW and a toaster is rated at 800 W. Explain which appliance transfers energy faster and why.
correct_answer: The kettle transfers energy faster because it has a higher power rating (2 kW = 2,000 W, which is greater than 800 W). A higher power rating means energy is transferred more quickly.
explanation: When comparing power ratings, the appliance with the higher power rating transfers energy more quickly. We need to convert 2 kW to 2,000 W to compare fairly, since 1 kilowatt (kW) = 1,000 watts (W).
